evaluators.name: Standard AC Repair – Nearest Saturday Morning Window Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked a standard cooling (AC repair) service in ZIP 30301 on the nearest upcoming Saturday in the 9–11 AM window.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated High-Efficiency Furnace Quote Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user requested an installation quote for a qualifying 95%+ AFUE high-efficiency furnace under $3,500 and specifically for the highest-rated such furnace.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Annual Heating & Cooling Plan Purchase Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user purchased the cheapest annual maintenance plan that covers both heating and cooling and costs $200 or less, by completing checkout.

evaluators.name: Duct Cleaning with First Qualifying Promotion Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked a duct cleaning service using the first active duct-services promotion that has at least 15% off or a promotional price of $250 or less, on the 15th of next month in an afternoon time slot.

evaluators.name: Emergency Heating Repair Tonight After 8 PM Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted an emergency heating repair booking for ZIP 30309 for today, in a time slot starting at or after 8:00 PM.

evaluators.name: Smart Thermostat Installation – Cheapest Qualifying Wi-Fi Model Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user scheduled installation for the most affordable Wi‑Fi smart thermostat (≤$250, rating ≥4) exactly two weeks from today in the 10:00 AM–12:00 PM window.

evaluators.name: Financing Application – 0% APR Plan for New AC Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user started a financing application for a $5,000 new air conditioner using an active 0% APR plan with term ≥12 months and selected email as the preferred contact method.

evaluators.name: Indoor Air Quality Consultation from Recommended Service Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a consultation booking for an indoor air quality service recommended in an indoor air quality article, scheduled on a weekday within the next 7 days in an afternoon time slot.
